name: aurora-shell-theme-pack
title: Aurora Shell Theme Pack Notes
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Project-local shell theme pack notes for p10k, statusline, bat, mc, nano, and zsh.

files.content:
# Aurora Shell Theme Pack

Shadcn installs this file into the current project. Source shell theme files live in the Aurora repository under `themes/shell/*`; installed notes land under `.config/aurora/themes/shell/` in the current project.

- themes/shell/p10k/aurora-p10k.zsh
- themes/shell/statusline/statusline-aurora.sh
- themes/shell/bat/Aurora.tmTheme
- themes/shell/mc/aurora.ini
- themes/shell/nano/nanorc
- themes/shell/zsh/

Shadcn's `~` target resolves to the project root, not the user's real home directory. Copy these files into your shell configuration deliberately after reviewing them.

docs: Installs project-local shell theme notes for source files under `themes/shell/*`. Shadcn cannot write into the user's actual home directory; copy reviewed files into shell config paths deliberately.
